description:
Recto: Accounts of the bookseller in Judaeo-Arabic, here listing books sold or belonging to the widow of Bū Saʿd. 

Verso: Accounts in Arabic script (continuing onto Bodl. MS heb. f 22/41r) in which he says he has settled accounts with 'my father the teacher' and neither owes the other anything until the end of Rabīʿ I, except for the following books. There follows a list of books, most with titles in Hebrew written in Arabic script.


See also description for the whole notebook, Bodl. MS heb. f 22/19–52 (PGPID 33686).
description_he: רקטו: חשבונות סוחר ספרים ביהודית-ערבית; ספרים שנמכרו/שייכים לאלמנת בו סעד; ורסו: חשבונות בכתב ערבי עם רשימת ספרים בכותרות עברית
